# OceanViewFlats

OceanViewFlats offers premium beachfront vacation rentals in the exclusive Playa Salguero area of Santa Marta, Magdalena, Colombia. 

## Our Properties

We currently offer two distinct, highly-optimized flats for your stay:

### [OceanViewFlats 1707](https://www.oceanviewflats.com/Oceanview1707)
* **Target Audience:** Digital Nomads and Remote Workers
* **Capacity:** 2 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms, up to 6 Guests
* **Key Features:** High-speed Wi-Fi, laptop-friendly workspace, fully equipped kitchen, air conditioning, and a private balcony with stunning Caribbean sea sunsets.

### [OceanViewFlats 1606](https://www.oceanviewflats.com/Oceanview1606)
* **Target Audience:** Families and Romantic Escapes
* **Capacity:** 2 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms, up to 6 Guests
* **Key Features:** Spacious layout, private terrace, resort-style amenities, fully equipped kitchen, and a cozy atmosphere for unforgettable moments.

## Common Amenities
All of our flats include:
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- Fully equipped kitchens
- Air conditioning
- Access to the building's swimming pool (open daily, closed Tuesdays)
- Free on-site parking
- Stunning ocean views just one block from the beach

## Location
Playa Salguero, Santa Marta, Magdalena, Colombia (CO).

## Your Host
Manuel Enrique - With years of experience in hospitality, dedicated to providing a premium, seamless stay.

## Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: Where is OceanViewFlats located?**
A: We are located in the exclusive Playa Salguero area of Santa Marta, Colombia, just one block from the beach.

**Q: What amenities are included?**
A: All flats include high-speed Wi-Fi, fully equipped kitchens, air conditioning, and access to the building's swimming pool.
